source.section: Part 12 - Datalink & IFF > IFF from AZ/EL Page > Manual IFF (AZ/EL)

steps.action: Power Up IFF (Identify-Friend-or-Foe) and Datalink systems as shown previously in the MANUAL IFF – NCTR example.
Make sure your Radar Power switch is set to OPR and Master Mode is set to A/A.
Set Sensor Control Switch to the AZ/EL DDI (Sensor Control Switch Left since we showed up the AZ/EL page on the left DDI). A diamond will appear to show the left DDI is selected.
Set AZ/EL Sub-page to IFF RDR.
Press the OSB next to L&S INT (Launch & Steering Interrogation) activate (boxed).
Move the TDC over the target using the TDC controls.
Interrogate target by using the Sensor Control Switch DEPRESS control for less than 1 second, then Sensor Control Switch RIGHT.
